findings.title: memory_save probes raw caller paths before allowed-root validation
findings.impact: A caller can distinguish an existing outside-root path from a missing outside-root path because the raw path is checked with fs.existsSync before the allowed-root validator runs.
findings.recommendedFix: Canonicalize and validate containment before any existence probe. For outside-root paths, return the same access-denied response regardless of whether the target exists.

findings.title: Scoped memory_index_scan stale deletion is globally scoped
findings.impact: A scan invoked with specFolder discovers scoped files, but stale deletion scans all memory_index rows and can delete stale records outside the requested spec folder.
findings.recommendedFix: Thread the requested specFolder into stale path discovery and delete lookup, or disable global stale deletion when the scan is scoped.

findings.title: hf model-server demand listener accepts writable socket directories
findings.impact: A pre-existing SPECKIT_IPC_SOCKET_DIR that is owned by the current user but group/world writable is accepted before binding a local UDS, leaving the socket path vulnerable to sibling-user unlink or replacement races on shared hosts.
findings.recommendedFix: Reject or chmod pre-existing non-TCP socket directories unless they are private, preferably mode 0700, before binding or unlinking model-server sockets.
